content.text: http://localhost:8000/  apaga los puertos

@bash: "netstat -ano | findstr :8000"
@bash: "netstat -ano | findstr :8000 | findstr LISTENING"

[BASH for 'netstat -ano | findstr :8000']
  TCP [::1]:8000 [::]:0 LISTENING 5560
  TCP [::1]:8000 [::]:0 LISTENING 7076

@bash: "taskkill /F /PID 5560"
@bash: "taskkill /F /PID 7076"
